(a) and (b), were in the original references to titles I through VIII of , which enacted subchapters I through VIII of this chapter. In addition to enacting subchapter V, title V enacted , The Public Health and Welfare, amended sections 1437a, 1437c to 1437e, 1437g, 1437, 1437n, 1437u to 1437x, 1437aaa–5, 1437aaa–6, 1439, 11371 to 11376, 11382, 11401, 11403g, 11408, 11903a, 12747, and 12838 of Title 42, repealed sections 1437aa to 1437ee of Title 42, enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 11371, 12747, and 12899h–1 of Title 42, amended provisions set out as a note under , and repealed provisions set out as a note under , Banks and Banking. In addition to enacting subchapter VII, title VII amended sections 1715z–13a and 1721 of Title 12 and sections 11902 to 11905 of Title 42.
